items.headline: Zealand's stock plummets after disappointing drug result. Its CEO tells CNBC people need to focus less on the 'weight loss Olympics'

items.headline: Amazon says Anthropic’s Claude still OK for AWS customers to use outside defense work

items.headline: Anthropic CEO says 'no choice' but to challenge Trump admin's supply chain risk designation in court

items.headline: Anthropic officially told by DOD that it's a supply chain risk even as Claude used in Iran

items.headline: Trump tariffs: Customs and Border Protection tells judge it can't comply with refund order

items.headline: AI's got a gender gap: Women are more skeptical
